nasb.text: But when the Jews of Thessalonica found out that the word of God had been proclaimed by Paul in Berea also, they came there as well, agitating and stirring up the crowds.

esv.text: But when the Jews from Thessalonica learned that the word of God was proclaimed by Paul at Berea also, they came there too, agitating and stirring up the crowds.

cnv.text: 但帖撒羅尼迦的猶太人，知道保羅又在比里亞宣講　神的道，就到那裡去，煽動挑撥群眾。

ccb.text: 可是，帖撒罗尼迦的犹太人听到保罗在庇哩亚宣扬上帝的道，就赶来怂恿、煽动众人。

csbs.text: 可是当帖撒罗尼迦的犹太人知道保罗又在庇里亚城传扬神的话语时，就来到那里煽动、搅扰民众。
